product_overview: Backend API platform for authentication, organization setup, role-based access retrieval, task management, and approval workflows. The product is intended to support core business operations, but current risk analysis highlights critical gaps in backend authorization and tenant isolation.
core_goals: Enable secure user authentication and JWT token issuance
Support organization creation with default site provisioning
Provide dashboard data, task creation/toggling, and approval actions for authenticated users
Expose role-based access mappings for logged-in users
Prevent unauthorized access, IDOR, and cross-tenant data leakage through backend enforcement

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Allows users to authenticate with credentials and receive JWT tokens for subsequent authenticated requests.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login/ with valid username and password -> Receive 200 with access, refresh, and id tokens -> Use access token for authenticated API requests
POST /api/auth/login/ with invalid password -> Receive authentication failure response -> No JWT tokens are issued

features.name: MyDay Dashboard & Approvals
features.description: Provides the authenticated user's dashboard data and enables approval actions on HR or general requests.
user_flows: GET /api/myday/dashboard/ with a valid JWT token -> Receive 200 with current user, summary stats, and pending approvals -> Review pending approval items on the dashboard
POST /api/myday/approvals/{approval_id}/action/ with valid JWT token and action=approve for an approval assigned to the user -> Receive 200 with approval message and updated status

POST /api/myday/approvals/{approval_id}/action/ with valid JWT token and action=approve for an approval owned by another user -> Receive 200 or other non-forbidden response due to missing ownership enforcement -> Approval is improperly processed

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Lets authenticated users create tasks and toggle task status from the MyDay workflow.
user_flows: POST /api/myday/tasks/create/ with valid JWT token and task title plus priority -> Receive 200 with message and task_id -> Use task_id to continue task lifecycle actions
POST /api/myday/tasks/{task_id}/toggle/ with valid JWT token -> Receive 200 with message and updated status -> Task state changes successfully
POST /api/myday/tasks/create/ without a valid JWT token -> Receive authorization failure response -> Task is not created

features.name: Role Based Access Control
features.description: Returns the currently logged-in user's access routes and role-based permissions for UI and client-side decisioning.
user_flows: GET /api/rbac/role-access/my_access/ with a valid JWT token -> Receive 200 with role and access array -> Client uses returned access rules to determine available modules
GET /api/rbac/role-access/my_access/ without a valid JWT token -> Receive authentication failure response -> No access mapping is returned

features.name: Organization Setup
features.description: Creates a new organization and default site for onboarding and tenant provisioning.
user_flows: POST /api/organization/organizations/ with valid JWT token and organization admin details -> Receive 201 with organization id and name -> New organization and default site are created
POST /api/organization/organizations/ with missing required fields such as admin_email or admin_name -> Receive validation error response -> Organization is not created

endpoints.description: Authenticate user and return JWT tokens
Retrieve user dashboard data including tasks, meetings, and pending approvals
Approve or decline an HR request or general approval

features.name: Role Based Access Control
features.description: Manage and retrieve user access rules

endpoints.description: Get access routes for the currently logged-in user
Create a new organization and default site

known_limitations.impact: Users can approve requests they do not own
Users can bypass UI restrictions via API

known_limitations.issue: Tenant Data Leakage via Standard ViewSets
